segments.text: Good evening, and welcome to Senate House at the University of Cambridge for 90 minutes of question, answer, and live debate.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_12

segments.text: But we have been proven right.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_12

segments.text: On June 8th, it's your decision, your country, your vote.

segments.text: Vote UKIP.

segments.text: Caroline Lucas, co-leader of the Green Party.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_04

segments.text: Tonight, this country stands at a crossroads and the choice is stark.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: You can stand up for what really matters, values of openness, tolerance and compassion.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: Or you can turn inward to isolation, division and hate.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: You know, one more MP from the other parties makes no real difference.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: But more Green MPs would be truly transformative.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: On June the 8th, I urge you, don't look back.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: Choose what kind of future you really want.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: Vote for change.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: Vote Green.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: And together, let's build a caring and a more confident Britain.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: Jeremy Corbyn.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: Tonight, we've seen the real choice facing our country.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_14

segments.text: between a Labour government and a Conservative government.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_14

segments.text: This election will decide whether young people are saddled with debt or freed from it, whether we invest in our National Health Service, schools and social care, or they continue to be cut, whether older people get the dignity they deserve or see their incomes fall.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_14

segments.text: On June the 8th, you have the power to decide.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_14

segments.text: Vote Labour for the many, not the few.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_14

segments.text: Angus Robertson.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_04

segments.text: In this debate, you've heard different views about the kind of country we should be.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_13

segments.text: For those watching in England, Wales and Northern Ireland, the SNP will always work with others who share our belief in fairness of an outward-looking, welcoming society.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_13

segments.text: Now more than ever, we need a strong opposition to hold the Tories to account.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_13

segments.text: The SNP will be that strong voice for Scotland and our pledge is this, to work every day to make Scotland the very best country it can be.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_13

segments.text: Vote SNP.

segments.text: Leanne Wood.

segments.text: Tonight you've heard that Plaid Cymru is the only party putting Wales on the agenda during this election.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_11

segments.text: But our MPs will play their part for the whole of the UK.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_11

segments.text: We will stand up for justice and fair play on pensions, on social care and for our cash-starved public services.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_11

segments.text: So I urge people back home to give us the mandate we need to defend Wales.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_11

segments.text: Liking us isn't enough.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_11

segments.text: We need your support and your vote.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_11

segments.text: Don't let our country be invisible in Westminster.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_11

segments.text: Vote Plaid.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_11
